export.heading: Export
export.zipDesc: Enable it as a resource pack in-game without touching the originals. Safe and easy to revert.
export.changePathHint: Export path follows the output folder from translation settings
export.ovDesc: KubeJS · FTB Quests · config translations a resource pack can't carry. Unzip and copy over the modpack folder.
export.ovNone: This modpack needs no override files — the resource pack alone is enough
export.ovHint: Created together with the resource pack

share.heading: Share with community
share.noticeRest: the desktop app notifies you. Accepting them improves your next translation and raises your contributor score.
share.done: Shared with the community — we'll notify you when corrections arrive
share.cfNoResults: No results — try a different name
share.cfRequired: Pick a CurseForge modpack to enable upload
share.loginRequired: Sign in with Discord to upload

empty.title: Export unlocks after translation
empty.desc: Once step 4 finishes, resource pack export and community sharing open here.
